overall.description: A stationary view of a greenhouse herbology classroom from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring stone flooring, glass and metal greenhouse structure, wooden work tables with magical plants, and students in wizard robes moving through the space. The scene is lit by natural sunlight diffused through the glass roof panels.

scene_state.functional_zone: greenhouse herbology classroom with work tables and magical plants

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the greenhouse interior from a fixed position near the entrance

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes with red trim walking from left foreground toward the background work tables

entered.detail: large curved glass and metal greenhouse structure with overhead lighting
irregular stone tile flooring with decorative metal drainage grate
long wooden tables arranged in rows with potted plants and gardening tools
large magical plant with prominent pink and purple flowers in a circular stone planter
decorative cast iron floor drain running along the left walkway

segments.scene_description: A stationary view inside a bright greenhouse classroom with natural light streaming through the glass roof. The stone floor and wooden work tables are arranged beneath hanging plants, while a large pink flowering magical plant dominates the right foreground. A student in wizard robes walks from the left side toward the background tables where other students are working.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, stationary perspective within a bright greenhouse classroom where natural light illuminates a bustling herbology lesson. It begins with a wide view of the stone flooring and wooden work tables arranged beneath a canopy of hanging greenery. As the scene unfolds, the focus remains on a large, vibrant pink flowering magical plant dominating the right foreground. The composition then shifts its internal energy as a student in wizard robes walks from the left side toward the background, where other students are actively working at their stations.
